‹ GalNet Chronicle
Entity Profile
P

Theta Seven

Person · First seen 3307-07-29 · 14 mentions
Active: 3307-07-29 → 3307-12-31
Mentions Timeline (14 articles)
3307-12-31
A Retrospective of 3307 (Part Four)
Historian Sima Kalhana concludes her 3307 review, covering the Yuri Grom honey trap, Torval family rift, Colonia Bridge, NMLA's final stand, and Salvation's superweapons.
3307-12-28
A Retrospective of 3307 (Part One)
Historian Sima Kalhana reviews the first quarter of 3307, covering the NMLA's rise, the Galactic Summit, the Nine Martyrs bombings, and the formation of ACT.
3307-12-16
NMLA Megaship Becomes Marlinist Flagship
The Steel Majesty megaship is transferred from Mudhrid to HIP 22550, renamed Fairfax Vision, and becomes the Marlinist Colonies' diplomatic flagship.
3307-12-13
The Death of Theta Seven
Theta Seven and his followers sacrifice themselves by destroying the Sacrosanct megaship in Mudhrid, killing thousands of Far God cultists, as ACT confirms the NMLA leader is dead.
3307-12-07
Standoff for ACT and Theta Seven
ACT faces a tense standoff with Theta Seven, who holds thousands of Far God cultists hostage aboard the Sacrosanct megaship in the Mudhrid system.
3307-12-02
Battle of Mudhrid Ends in NMLA Defeat
The Epsilon Fornacis Empire Group defeats the Neo-Marlinist Order of Mudhrid, with ACT commandos led by Milo Castile retaking the Steel Majesty megaship and preventing Theta Seven's escape.
3307-11-25
The Battle of Mudhrid
The Neo-Marlinist Order of Mudhrid and the Epsilon Fornacis Empire Group declare war in the Mudhrid system, with the NMLA defending Theta Seven aboard the Sacrosanct megaship.
3307-11-24
Far God Megaship Hijacked by Theta Seven
Theta Seven hijacks the Far God cult megaship Sacrosanct and redirects it to the Mudhrid system, where the NMLA is regrouping forces with the Steel Majesty.
3307-11-16
Theta Seven Traced to Panjabell System
A decoded message reveals Theta Seven infiltrated the Far God cult and may be hiding aboard one of three megaships in the Panjabell system.
3307-11-12
Manhunt for Theta Seven Escalates
ACT acquires an encrypted message that may reveal Theta Seven's location and requests assistance from the galactic community in decoding it.
3307-11-08
ACT Captures Theta Group
ACT arrests the NMLA's bomb-making engineers, Theta Group, but their leader Theta Seven remains at large. The group is responsible for 17 starport bombings with nearly 800,000 deaths.
3307-10-15
NMLA Aims to ‘Extinguish the Duval Line’
The NMLA claims responsibility for the Dyson City bombing and declares its intent to exterminate the entire Duval bloodline. ACT reveals Theta Group has split in two.
3307-09-06
ACT Scores Victories Against the NMLA
ACT reports major progress against the NMLA, raiding dozens of cells and arresting thousands of paramilitary activists following intelligence from the Marlinist civil war.
3307-07-29
NMLA Attacks Marlinist Starports
The NMLA bombs Stillman Hub in HIP 22550 and Tilman Point in Hyades Sector RO-P b6-6, killing tens of thousands. The attacks are believed to be retaliation for Verity Dexter's election loss. First Minister Jenna Fairfax is reported among the fatalities. Prime Consul Kayode Tau calls for emergency humanitarian aid.
